title: Import Transactions
subtitle: Import transactions from a CSV or Excel file
addPageBanner: Have a transactions file? Import from CSV or Excel

prepare.title: Before You Import
prepare.description: Import transactions from a CSV or Excel spreadsheet in a few simple steps.
prepare.templateDescription: Download the sample spreadsheet — it has all the columns Ten10 recognises. Fill it in, upload it here, and the system will auto-map the columns so you can go straight to reviewing the rows.
prepare.privacyNote: File contents are processed locally in this session and are not saved before you approve.
prepare.checklistTitle: Good to know before you start
prepare.checklistItem1: Your file is never uploaded to a server — parsing happens in the browser, and data is only saved after your final approval
prepare.checklistItem2: Nothing is saved until you review each row and approve it yourself
prepare.checklistItem3: Date and amount columns are required — everything else is optional
prepare.checklistItem4: Ten10 template available for download — not required, any CSV or XLSX with clear headers works
prepare.csvDesc: Any CSV file with column headers
prepare.ownFileHint: No template needed — if your file has clear column headers, Ten10 will try to map them automatically.

columns.title: Template Columns
columns.currency: Currency – defaults to your default currency if omitted

prepare.mappingDescription: In the next step you will link each column from your file to a Ten10 field. Date and Amount are required.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.dropzone: Drop your file here, or click to upload

errors.tooManyRows: File has too many rows (max {{rows}} rows)
errors.xlsNotSupported: .xls files are not supported. Please save as .xlsx
errors.parseError: Could not read the file. Make sure it is a valid CSV or Excel file.
errors.noData: The file has no data rows

sheetSelect.title: Select Sheet
sheetSelect.description: This workbook has multiple sheets. Select the one to import.

mapping.title: Map Columns
mapping.description: Link each column from your file to a Ten10 field. Columns marked with * are required.
mapping.whatIsMapping: Connect each column in your file to the matching field in Ten10. Review the suggestions and adjust if needed.
mapping.hint: Ten10 suggested mappings automatically — review them and adjust if needed.
mapping.ten10TemplateDetected: Ten10 template detected — columns were mapped automatically. Review and adjust if needed.

errors.dateMissing: You must map a Date column
errors.amountMissing: You must map an Amount column, or a Debit column, or a Credit column
errors.duplicateTarget: Each Ten10 field can only be mapped once
errors.amountAndDebitCredit: Cannot map both Amount and Debit/Credit at the same time

importing.loadingDescription: Writing approved rows to your account.

review.title: Review Import
review.previewLoadingDescription: Checking duplicates, recurring matches, and row validation.
review.noRows: No rows match the current filter.

confirm.title: Confirm Import
confirm.description_one: You are about to import {{count}} transaction.
confirm.description_other: You are about to import {{count}} transactions.

issues.foreign_currency_not_supported: Foreign-currency rows cannot be imported in this flow
issues.ambiguous_debit_credit: Both debit and credit have values
issues.formula_cell: Cell contains a formula (value was used)

settings.entryDescription: Add transactions from a CSV or Excel file. All rows are reviewed before anything is saved.
settings.note: This imports transactions from external spreadsheets. To restore a Ten10 backup, use the backup section above.
